Embedded AI Ads

Fal, Cursor, Remotion

Content

Role

Led creative direction on Embedded AI Ads, Darwin's core product placement format that inserts brands directly into existing creator videos across YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram without a reshoot or a single email back and forth. The format runs at real scale, spanning 1,000+ creators, 50,000+ ad slots, and 250M+ in audience reach, letting brands like McDonald's, Nike, Pepsi, and Doritos diversify ad spend into content that looks native rather than interruptive, the kind of placement viewers don't skip.

Motion Boards

Workflow

Creative concepts were developed as modular sequences for rapid testing across placements and audiences.

Editorial structure emphasized first-second clarity, product payoff, and platform-specific hooks.

The system supports quick swaps in copy, visuals, and pacing while keeping the campaign identity intact.
